history-populated.changeNote: Uses the selected horizontal tag rail, including a real seven-theme density case.

history-filters.changeNote: Adds the complete categorized 24-theme catalog to the existing History filters.

history-attempt-detail.changeNote: Shows all curated puzzle themes in the real replay flow reached from History.

practice-home.changeNote: Named reusable runs use centered bordered cards on Home with Add Run and edit entry points.

practice-home-edit.changeNote: Whole Run cards reorder in real time with animated insertion plus arrow-button fallbacks.

practice-custom-setup.changeNote: New Run defaults to All themes and saves to Home without starting.

practice-run-name-validation.changeNote: Custom run names are required and unique with inline errors.

practice-run-standard-editor.changeNote: Built-in ELO editing shows the Run name and returns to Home edit mode after Save or Cancel.

practice-custom-rating-editor.changeNote: Custom ELO editing shows the Run name, keeps creation settings fixed, and returns to Home edit mode.

practice-run-remove-confirmation.changeNote: Removal expands an inline warning directly below the selected Run and retains ELO and history.

practice-runs-empty.changeNote: An empty Home exposes both Add Run and retained-run restore paths.

settings-advanced-ratings.changeNote: Settings no longer owns ELO controls; each run editor owns its current ELO.
